explanation: I've added two key sales pipeline metrics: the total weighted pipeline value (deals weighted by their probability to close) and the count of open deals currently in your funnel. These give you a quick view of your sales team's potential revenue and deal volume.

widget.title: Key Insight
widget.subtitle: Monitor pipeline velocity and deal progression to forecast revenue timing and identify potential bottlenecks in your sales process.

quickActions.label: Add Sales Pipeline Funnel
quickActions.prompt: Show me the deal progression through each stage

quickActions.label: Add Win Rate Metrics
quickActions.prompt: Add win rate and average deal size KPIs

quickActions.label: Show Deal Sources
quickActions.prompt: Break down deals by source (inbound, outbound, referral)

verification.summary: All checks passed — data integrity verified.
